hero.eyebrow: Dr. Michael Conti PS5 · Jersey City
hero.title: At Conti, we believe we can achieve.
hero.subtitle: Our mission is to make every child's potential a reality by engaging and empowering families and communities to advocate for all children.
whatWeDo.heading: What We Do
whatWeDo.lead: The PS5 PTA is a National PTA member and 501(c)3 charitable organization. We fundraise to provide enrichment programs including theater, dance, assemblies, multicultural celebrations, school improvements, carnivals, awards, and family support.
whatWeDo.bullet[0]: Promote child welfare in schools and communities
whatsOn.heading: What's On
board.heading: Our Board
donors.heading: Our Donors
donors.lead: With thanks to the local businesses that support our students.
